likely_root_causes: Full site outage; POI breaker open; utility outage; DAS data loss
data_to_check: meter_energy_kwh; current_power_kw; breaker_status; recloser_status; inverter_status; das_heartbeat
recommended_next_action: Confirm whether revenue meter is also zero; check POI breaker/recloser and inverter fleet status.

likely_root_causes: Equipment outage; inverter offline; utility outage; curtailment not tagged
data_to_check: inverter_status; availability; curtailment_flag; grid_voltage_kv; event log
recommended_next_action: Create/confirm O&M ticket and estimate lost MWh since start time.

likely_root_causes: Soiling; vegetation; tracker issue; model/sensor issue; partial derate
recommended_next_action: Compare clear-day curve, inverter-level output, and irradiance sensor health before dispatch.

likely_root_causes: Expected model stale; bad irradiance sensor; backfilled meter data; wrong capacity; snow albedo/bifacial gain
data_to_check: expected_energy_kwh; poa_irradiance_wm2; meter_energy_kwh; ac_capacity_kw; recent config changes
recommended_next_action: Validate expected model inputs and meter scaling; do not mark as positive performance until confirmed.

likely_root_causes: DAS communication issue; device offline; frozen data feed
recommended_next_action: Check last valid timestamp and compare with revenue meter or utility portal.

likely_root_causes: Scaling error; missing intervals; meter replacement; CT/PT issue; backfill lag
recommended_next_action: Reconcile meter vs SCADA and verify CT/PT ratios and data interval completeness.

alert_or_pattern: One inverter at 0 while peers producing
likely_root_causes: Inverter fault; blown fuse; AC/DC disconnect open; comms on one inverter
recommended_next_action: Check inverter fault code and compare DC input/string current to peer inverter.

likely_root_causes: Grid event; MV equipment issue; plant controller; communication outage
data_to_check: breaker_status; grid_voltage_kv; inverter_status; das_heartbeat; relay logs
recommended_next_action: Check whether failures share a transformer/MV feeder/communication gateway.

alert_or_pattern: Tracker actual angle not following target
likely_root_causes: Tracker controller fault; stow; motor/power issue; network issue; wind event
recommended_next_action: Confirm if stow is commanded; if not, inspect affected tracker block.

likely_root_causes: Derate; clipping; inverter issue; soiling; tracker; curtailment
recommended_next_action: Compare normalized power to clear-day baseline and check curtailment flag.

alert_or_pattern: Low expected energy across many sites
likely_root_causes: Weather model issue; expected engine outage; shared data feed issue
data_to_check: expected_energy_kwh across portfolio; weather feed status; model timestamp
recommended_next_action: Check portfolio-wide expected model generation and weather feed freshness.

likely_root_causes: Missing mapping; wrong site metadata; threshold not configured
data_to_check: rule config; site metadata; device map
recommended_next_action: Fix configuration before using alert as operational evidence.
